subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! Thy call hath reached the hearing of the Wronged One of the horizons. Verily, He heareth and seeth, and He, verily, is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی ندایت باصغای مظلوم آفاق فائز انه یسمع و یری و انه لهو السمیع البصیر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @chastisement and requital, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
